message:
feat(validate): Implement validateReflectorOutput for schema validation

- Add validateReflectorOutput() to parse and validate LLM delta output
- Add type-specific validation for each delta type (add, helpful, harmful, replace, deprecate, merge)
- Add salvageValidDeltas() to recover valid deltas from malformed output
- Add extractBulletIds() and canApplyDelta() helper functions
- Proper error logging with warn() and log() utilities

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
